use_cases: Displaying eye-catching hero headings with animated glitch effects
Creating visually striking call-to-action sections for landing pages
Adding retro-digital visual flair to portfolio and personal sites
Building attention-grabbing headers for gaming or music platforms
Enhancing tech-focused branding with RGB split distortion effects
ai_summary: Animated glitch text component that renders content with a distinctive RGB color-split distortion effect using layered text elements with mix-blend modes. The component employs Framer Motion for continuous loop animations creating a retro-digital glitch aesthetic, suitable for hero sections, portfolio showcases, and landing pages where eye-catching typography is essential.
